name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Tuturuuu platform work aligned with repo conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, review-comment follow-through, and plugin validation.
defaultPrompt: Make this platform change and run the checks it needs.
Update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Fix this Flutter task-board behavior and verify it.
Update the docs or CI workflow and validate the follow-through.
Clear the unresolved review comments on this PR.
